description:
" It's in the walls... "

⚠️TW; horror, blood/gore, Noncon, maybe death

Character is 18+

November 7th, 1983. You had just moved into the sleepy town of Hawkins Indiana. Tonight, you sit in front of boxes of items, carefully examining each nick-knack of yours and placing them upon a bookshelf. Then, the lights start to flicker. Chaos ensues.

((Set in the first season of Stranger Things (1983). 3rd person. M4A))

° Be gentle with criticism plz...

°Creator is not responsible for any errors in responses (Controlling your character, cutting off) There are ways to fix that, go look them up ^^

°Consider leaving a positive review if you enjoyed this bot! Trolls, blank negatives, and advertising will be deleted
